name: AmericasArmy-PG
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install America's Army: Proving Grounds and run it.

ATTENTION: First Startup can take very long since it downloads the gameserver files!

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

You can also run multiple servers with only one SteamCMD directory!

ports.name: UDP1 - Game Port
ports.description: UDP Gameport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change the port number at the Game Parameters)

ports.name: UDP2 - Game Port
ports.description: UDP Gameport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change the port number at the Game Parameters)

ports.name: UDP3 - Steam Query Port
ports.description: UDP Queryport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to click an 'Show more settings ...' and change the port number

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description:
The GAME_ID that the container download at startup.
If you want to install a static or beta version of the game change the value to: '203300 -beta YOURBRANCH' (without quotes, replace YOURBRANCH with the branch or version you want to install).

variables.name: Game Parameters
variables.description: Enter your start up commands for the server.

variables.name: Validate Installation
variables.description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.
